releaseNotes:
fix: fetch app version from backend in AboutSettings

Problem:
- AboutSettings.tsx had hardcoded version '0.1.0'
- Version displayed in UI didn't match actual build version
- Users saw outdated version even after updates

Solution:
- Use useEffect to fetch version from UpdateService.GetCurrentVersion()
- Display '加载中...' while loading, '未知' on error
- Version now matches the ldflags-injected version

Benefits:
- ✅ Version always accurate in UI
- ✅ Reflects actual compiled version
- ✅ No manual updates needed

Testing:
- npm run build: successful
- TypeScript compilation: passed

Related: #S387, commits f961845, 95a7ab7, 401636a
